description: A pasta paradise! Shelves are lined with ramen, Mac and Cheese, and Indomie. The air is thick with the scent of boiling wheat.

J.name: Jelly Floor
J.description: A jiggly, jelly-like surface. Stepping here might launch you!

item.name: Spicy Noodles
item.description: Exotic and very spicy noodles from the factory.

B.name: Deformed Barry
B.description: It's Barry, but he looks half-melted and sparking with rage!

dialogue.text: YOU WON'T GET AWAY WITH THIS! TAKE A SEAT IN THE SCRAPYARD!

H.name: Maintenance Hatch
H.description: A heavy metal hatch. It looks like it hasn't been opened in years.

conditions.failMessage: The hatch is stuck tight. You need specialized knowledge to open this without a key.

item.name: Factory Blueprints
item.description: Detailed blueprints of the Noodle Factory. Very valuable!
